---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that the project doesn't support today? Describe the user / operator / developer scenario.

**Proposal**
What would you like to see built? Be specific. A link to relevant prior art is great.

**Alternatives considered**
What did you think of and reject?

**Willingness to contribute**
- [ ] I can write the PR
- [ ] I can write tests
- [ ] I can review related PRs
- [ ] I'm just reporting, won't be contributing code
